calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-01-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (Department 525)

Appearances:
Appellant, Michael A. Waul, is present in propria persona.

Respondent, Arthur M. Tom, is present in propia persona.

This matter comes on calendar for Trial De Novo. The parties sign the stipulation to use Judge Pro Tem to hear the trial. The parties are sworn.

Michael A. Waul testifies and presents his case on his own behalf. Arthur M. Tom testifies and presents his case on his own behalf.

After hearing all oral testimony, the Court takes the matter under submission. Plaintiff's and Defendant's evidence from the Small Claims remains in the file.

(After the hearing was over, Michael A. Waul left behind two small pieces of rugs in the courtroom. The Court ordered the rugs place in the court's file as evidence)
